race.comment: A BOY NAMED SOO (10) consistent Mudgee-trained gelding racing in career best form. Kept fresh when he stormed home over the top of them to salute over 1600m at Orange. Back in trip and has a good record over this course and distance. Genuine contender in this tougher race. WAL'S ANGELS (6) handy gelding who made up good ground late with a slashing fifth over 1180m at Gundagai. Comes to hand quickly and looks set for a good campaign. NOISES (7) fourth-up today and struggling to draw a decent gate. Never on the track with the 59kg with a struggling ninth over 1600m at Hawkesbury. Tongue-tie comes off and the winkers go on. Can take a hand in the finish. DEEPWATER ARTIST (4) improving gelding drawn out for this. Place best on the quick back-up.
